metadata.title: Turning a 1v3 on VALORANT’s Icebox with Steady Aim and Smart Angles
metadata.description:
Watch this clutch 1v3 where calm movement and sharp shots flip the round. Notice how positioning and timing help secure every kill.
What’s your favorite clutch moment in VALORANT? Share below!

Got a clutch like this? Drop your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
